case_title: YUK WAH SHUNG VS. JUSTIN PHILIP SANTOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,755.98 FILED BY SHUNG, YUK WAH AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, JUSTIN PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
